features.name: unlabeled generate block with else-if conditional
features.description: Code should include an unlabeled generate block containing an else-if conditional statement where the else-if body contains executable statements
features.snippet: generate if (cond) begin end else if (cond) begin end endgenerate

features.name: module instantiation inside for loop creating multiple instances
features.description: Code should include a module instantiation inside a for loop to create multiple instances of the same module
features.snippet: for (genvar i=0; i<N; i++) begin inst_name #(.PARAM(val)) u_inst(); end
